report.name: Maven Market Performance Dashboard
report.author: Hector Martin

pages.name: Executive Dashboard
pages.description: High-level KPI overview: Revenue vs Target, Top Stores, Top Brands, Country Map
visuals: Line & Clustered Column – Revenue vs Target
Bar Chart – Top 5 Stores by Revenue
Donut Chart – Top 5 Brands by Revenue

pages.name: Regional Analysis
pages.description: Drill-down from Country to Region to Store with comparative performance metrics

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Product-level revenue, profitability, return rates, dynamic KPI selector
visuals: Line Chart – Revenue trend by product
Bar Chart – Top 5 Brands by Revenue and Profit
Table – Product detail with Orders, Cost, Revenue, Profit, Returns, Return %
Field Parameter slicer – Orders / Revenue / Profit / Cost / Returns / Return %

pages.name: Customer Detail
pages.description: Customer growth trends, demographic segmentation, top 50 customers
visuals: Bar Chart – Revenue by Customer Type
Donut Chart – Revenue by Education Level
Donut Chart – Revenue by Age Group
Boxplot (Python/Seaborn) – Revenue distribution by Age Group

pages.name: Time Intelligence
pages.description: YoY trends, MoM %, YTD, 60-Day Rolling Revenue, Weekend Analysis
visuals: Matrix – Date-level revenue with YTD and Revenue Target Gap

report.navigation: Custom page navigation bar using bookmarks and buttons
python_visuals: Heatmap – Revenue by Country vs Year/Month (Seaborn)
Boxplot – Revenue distribution by Age Group (Seaborn)
